Person.rationale: A human is permanently a human.

Student.rationale: One can stop being a student; depends on a school.

Employee.rationale: A role; depends on an employer.

violations.message: 'Person' (rigid: being a Person is permanent) is placed under anti-rigid 'Student' (an instance can stop being a Student). An anti-rigid class cannot subsume a rigid one — re-parent 'Person' or model the 'Student' aspect as a role/relationship, not a superclass.
'Student' is externally dependent but its subclass 'Person' is independent. A dependent class cannot subsume an independent one — dependence is inherited downward.
